title: Saving Is a Love Letter to Future Me
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing fear around saving money
excerpt: A short energy statement for when saving feels like restriction or sacrifice. The release clears the scarcity feeling that comes with putting money aside; the allow opens to saving as a generous act toward the version of you who will use it.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow structure is drawn from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for Day 52 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A two-minute energy statement for reframing savings. The release clears the sense of loss that can come with moving money away from the current account; the allow opens to saving as something you're doing for someone who deserves it.
I am ready to release all feelings of restriction, loss, and sacrifice around saving money. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow saving as a generous, loving act toward my future self, where every pound set aside is a message that she matters. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for Day 52 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
